text: Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-C (Designation of state expressways) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 145-A — State expressway routes

Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-C (Designation of state expressways) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-C (Designation of state expressways) .
